title: Day 2 Lesson 4 -  Video Repetition
html:
The focus of this repetition is on these four sentences: 

Sentence 1 - これ は だれ の きょうかしょ ですか。(Kore wa dare no kyookasho deska?) = Who does this textbook belong to?

Sentence 2 - わたしの です。(Watashi no des) = It is mine.

Sentence 3 - この ぺんけーす も りん さん の ですか。(Kono pen keesu mo Rin-san no deska?) = Is this pencil case also yours (Rin-san)?

Sentence 4 - それ は きむ さん の です。(Sore wa Kimu-san no des) = It is Kim-san's.

How to use this lesson - Please watch the video twice (first with the subtitles and then without them) and repeat the sentences.
